name: VNTANA — Update Product Attributes from Attachment

parameters.content:
## ⚙️ Configure Before Activating

Set these two n8n **Variables** (Settings → Variables):
- `VNTANA_EMAIL` — your VNTANA login email
- `VNTANA_PASSWORD` — your VNTANA password

Set these four values directly on the **Config** node below:
- `productUuid` — the VNTANA product UUID
- `clientUuid` — the workspace UUID
- `productName` — product name (required by VNTANA PUT)
- `filePrefix` — attachment filename must start with this (default: `attributes_completed_`)

## How It Works
1. Runs on a timer (every 15 min by default)
2. Searches the product's attachments for a file named `{filePrefix}*.xlsx`
3. Skips if the file was already processed (tracked in workflow static data)
4. Downloads the file, reads two columns: **attribute_key** | **attribute_value**
5. **Replaces** all product attributes with the rows from the sheet

## Spreadsheet Format
| attribute_key | attribute_value |
|---|---|
| my_key | my value |
| hotspot_translations_fr | {"uuid": {"title": "...", "description": "..."}} |

Values can be plain strings or JSON. Any existing attributes not in the sheet are removed.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: Edit the four values at the top of this node.

nodes.name: New File?
nodes.notes: True branch: new file found. False branch: nothing to do.

nodes.name: Parse Spreadsheet
nodes.notes: Reads every row as a JSON object. Expects columns: attribute_key | attribute_value

nodes.name: Build Attributes
nodes.notes: Converts rows to VNTANA attributes array. Values can be plain strings or JSON strings.

nodes.name: Write to VNTANA
nodes.notes: PUTs {uuid, name, attributes} — replaces all product attributes.

meta.description: Watches a VNTANA product's attachments on a timer. When a new .xlsx file named attributes_completed_*.xlsx appears, reads two columns (attribute_key / attribute_value) and replaces the product's attributes entirely. Works for any VNTANA product and any attribute keys. Requires VNTANA_EMAIL and VNTANA_PASSWORD n8n variables.
